info.description: API for task management with Kanban + Timeboxing + AI commands
info.title: FLOWSTATE API

post.description:
Executes AI commands for workflow automation:
- /descomponer: Break a task into subtasks
- /estimar: Estimate time for a task
- /planificar: Create a daily plan
Maintains conversation context (last 5 sessions) for personalized responses.
Auto-compacts context when 6+ sessions accumulated.

get.description: Obtiene el historial de sesiones de IA del usuario
Obtiene una sesión específica por ID
Confirms user email with the provided token

post.description: Authenticates user and returns Supabase JWT

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user based on JWT

post.description: Creates a new user account and sends confirmation email

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics: tasks grouped by status and priority, column summaries with task counts. Use to power dashboard visualizations and productivity analytics.
Returns focus time analytics: total planned minutes, completed minutes, and remaining minutes. Use to display daily focus progress and productivity metrics.
Returns all tasks for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a task in the specified Kanban column. Default column is "backlog". Priority options: low, medium, high.

get.description: Returns a specific task by its ID

put.description: Updates an existing task with new data

post.description: Marks a task as completed by moving it to the "done" column. Triggers any associated AI workflow notifications.

get.description: Returns the note associated with a task (singleton per task). Returns empty note if none exists.

put.description: Creates or replaces the note for a task (idempotent PUT)

patch.description: Updates task position and column (drag & drop)

get.description: Returns user's time blocks, optionally filtered by date

post.description: Creates a new time block for the user

get.description: Returns today's time blocks for the authenticated user. Includes completed blocks with time metrics.

delete.description: Deletes a time block by ID

post.description: Marks a time block as completed
Marks a time block as active (in progress)

get.description: Returns today's tasks and time blocks for planning. Provides focus time metrics comparing planned vs completed minutes. Use this endpoint to power the daily planning view.
